## Xtask Commands

```
Hooksmith project tasks

Usage: xtask <COMMAND>

Commands:
  build                   Build the project and all components
  gen-wit                 Generate WIT interface definitions
  gen-lefthook            Generate Lefthook configuration
  gen-docs                Generate documentation
  gen-docs-comprehensive  Generate comprehensive documentation from Rust code and templates
  gen-schema-docs         Generate schema and WIT documentation
  gen-readme              Generate README with CLI help and module docs
  gen-mods                Generate mod.rs files for commands and modules
  gen-hooks-readme        Generate hooks README
  gen-all-legacy          Run all code generation tasks
  check                   Check if generated files are up to date
  check-all               Comprehensive check: cargo check + contract validation
  validate                Validate project configuration
  contract-validate       Hierarchical contract validation
  validate-generated      Validate generated files to prevent manual modifications
  add-generated-headers   Add generated file headers to all generated files
  validate-headers        Validate that all generated files have proper headers
  gen-templates           Generate documentation using Rust templates
  check-stable            Check if current changes are compatible with the last release
  test-with-release       Test current version against released version
  compare-with-release    Compare outputs between current and released version
  setup-git-filters       Set up Git filters for contract validation
  check-files             Check file types and generation markers
  validate-files          Validate files against strict extension policy (.rs and .jsonc only)
  gen-all                 Generate all code-generated files
  bootstrap               Bootstrap the project with all generated files
  gen-gitattributes       Generate Git attributes files
  gen-config              Generate all configuration files from Rust structs
  validate-config         Validate all configuration files
  contract                Contract-driven bootstrap & validation workflow
  contract-validation     Enhanced contract validation with Git notes
  status                  Track Rust-owned project files and coverage
  contract-check          Comprehensive contract validation and status check
  code-stats              Analyze code statistics and quality
  validate-commit-msg     Validate commit message (Trunk-style: allows empty messages)
  setup-git-aliases       Set up git aliases for Trunk-style commit workflow
  validate-docs           Validate documentation generation (replaces validate-docs.sh)
  git-commit              Git commit with Trunk-style empty message support (replaces git-trunk-commit.sh)
  setup-pre-commit        Set up pre-commit hook (replaces setup-pre-commit.sh)
  pre-commit              Run pre-commit validation (replaces pre-commit script)
  run-hooks               Run hooks with clean, summarized output
  dead-code-check         Check for dead code by temporarily stripping #[allow(dead_code)] attributes
  convert-jsonc           Convert JSON files to JSONC format with comments
  jsonc                   Process JSONC configuration files
  auto-push               Automated git workflow: validate, add, commit, and push
  clean-auto-push         Clean auto-push workflow with porcelain output and comprehensive logging
  structured-auto-push    Structured auto-push workflow with JSONL output and event bus integration
  hook                    Run a specific hook using the state machine
  list-hooks              List all available hooks
  gen-lefthook-hooks      Generate Lefthook configuration that uses the hook state machine
  event-stream            Event stream management and monitoring
  event-bus               Event bus management and processing
  wasm-components         WASM component management
  dashboard               Interactive dashboard for monitoring and auto-push
  gen-schema              Generate JSON schema for AutoPushEvent
  validate-schema         Validate JSONL output against schema
  sarif                   SARIF and CodeQL integration commands
  git-lefthook            Git + Lefthook integration with event-driven state machine
  help                    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
```

### Xtask Subcommands

#### build Command
```
Build the project and all components

Usage: xtask build [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --target <TARGET>  Build target (native, wasm, all) [default: all]
      --release          Release build
  -h, --help             Print help
```

#### gen-wit Command
```
Generate WIT interface definitions

Usage: xtask gen-wit [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output-dir <OUTPUT_DIR>  Output directory for WIT files [default: wit]
      --overwrite                Whether to overwrite existing files
  -h, --help                     Print help
```

#### gen-lefthook Command
```
Generate Lefthook configuration

Usage: xtask gen-lefthook [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output <OUTPUT>  Output file path [default: lefthook.yml]
      --validate         Whether to validate against schema
  -h, --help             Print help
```

#### gen-docs Command
```
Generate documentation

Usage: xtask gen-docs [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output-dir <OUTPUT_DIR>  Output directory for documentation [default: docs]
      --open                     Whether to open docs in browser
  -h, --help                     Print help
```

#### gen-schema-docs Command
```
Generate schema and WIT documentation

Usage: xtask gen-schema-docs [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output-dir <OUTPUT_DIR>  Output directory for documentation [default: docs]
      --pdf                      Whether to generate PDF output
      --html                     Whether to generate HTML output
      --epub                     Whether to generate EPUB output
      --open                     Whether to open docs in browser
  -h, --help                     Print help
```

#### gen-readme Command
```
Generate README with CLI help and module docs

Usage: xtask gen-readme [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output <OUTPUT>  Output file path [default: README.md]
      --overwrite        Whether to overwrite existing file
  -h, --help             Print help
```

#### gen-mods Command
```
Generate mod.rs files for commands and modules

Usage: xtask gen-mods [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --overwrite  Whether to overwrite existing files
  -h, --help       Print help
```

#### gen-hooks-readme Command
```
Generate hooks README

Usage: xtask gen-hooks-readme [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --output <OUTPUT>  Output file path [default: hooks/README.md]
      --overwrite        Whether to overwrite existing file
  -h, --help             Print help
```

#### gen-all Command
```
Generate all code-generated files

Usage: xtask gen-all [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --validate  Whether to validate generated files
      --force     Whether to force regeneration
  -h, --help      Print help
```

#### check Command
```
Check if generated files are up to date

Usage: xtask check [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --strict  Exit with error if files are not up to date
  -h, --help    Print help
```

#### validate Command
```
Validate project configuration

Usage: xtask validate [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --trunk    Validate Trunk configuration
      --cargo    Validate Cargo workspace
      --modules  Validate module/test consistency
      --all      Validate all configurations
  -h, --help     Print help
```

#### contract-validate Command
```
Hierarchical contract validation

Usage: xtask contract-validate <COMMAND>

Commands:
  clean                Clean operation for Git filter
  smudge               Smudge operation for Git filter
  diff                 Diff operation for Git diff
  validate             Validate changes in a commit range
  verify               Verify validation chain integrity
  show                 Show validation notes for a commit
  pre-commit           Pre-commit hook for validation
  post-commit          Post-commit hook for validation
  validate-extensions  Validate file extensions against whitelist
  help                 Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
```

#### check-stable Command
```
Check if current changes are compatible with the last release

Usage: xtask check-stable [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --version <VERSION>  Version to check against [default: 0.1.0]
      --comprehensive      Run comprehensive compatibility tests
  -h, --help               Print help
```

#### test-with-release Command
```
Test current version against released version

Usage: xtask test-with-release

Options:
      --version <VERSION>  Version to test against [default: 0.1.0]
  -h, --help               Print help
```

#### compare-with-release Command
```
Compare outputs between current and released version

Usage: xtask compare-with-release

Options:
      --version <VERSION>  Version to compare against [default: 0.1.0]
  -h, --help               Print help
```

#### setup-git-filters Command
```
Set up Git filters for contract validation

Usage: xtask setup-git-filters [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --force  Force overwrite existing configuration
  -h, --help   Print help
```
